positive: A stylized, minimalist forest scene capturing the magic hour. The central composition features a grove of delicate, bioluminescent mushroom clusters radiating soft, ethereal light. Interwoven with the mushrooms are silhouettes of whispering ferns and abstract vines, creating a layered, deep forest texture. The overall aesthetic is highly contrasting, with deep indigo and forest emerald greens forming the background, punctuated by pops of neon cyan and warm golden yellow emanating from the flora. The style is modern illustration meets abstract art, perfect for textile printing. Flat vector elements mixed with detailed, high-contrast lighting effects. Clean silhouette focus, symmetrical composition, high contrast, clean edges, concept art.
negative: blur, grain, noise, watermark, text, logo, signature, artist name, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low detail, photorealistic, bokeh, grayscale
